free_text: C12(gamma,n)C11 Cross Section to 65 MeV
Iowa State University 70-MeV
synchrotron.
The collimated bremsstrahlung beam.
Two 3-in. diameter NaI(Tl) crystals.
Cylinders of polystyrene 1.5 in. long and 1.125 in.
in diameter.
BP
The lower horizontal bar (given as EN-RSL-FW) is the
resolution function full width at half-maximum.
Data taken in 125-keV intervals: Following
irradiation for 13 min, a 2-min time delay elapsed
during which a sample was removed to a counting
house. The time delay allowed all competing
activities to decay to background, leaving only the
20.5-min positron decay of 11C.
Least Structure analysis.
The vertical error bar is the error as
computed by Least Structure analysis.
Detector efficiency.
Fig. 1, page 725. Continuous curves and the
points for digitization were determined by the
compiler.
